summary: Tested task workflow features in Support Pod for Emma Chen (athlete_3). All 9 requested features working correctly: task completion with completed_by/completed_at fields, completion activity log, completed section display with strikethrough, task escalation creating director action, escalation activity log, escalate modal functionality, task cancellation, add task flow, and frontend sections with proper count badges and status indicators.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in select dropdown - hydration warning, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tasks during testing for workflow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task workflow features tested in iteration 119. Backend tests cover: task creation, completion (completed_by/completed_at), escalation (creates director_action), cancellation (cancelled_by/cancelled_at), and activity event logging for each. Frontend verified: NextActions component with data-testid='next-actions', add-action-btn, toggle-completed-actions, action-item-{id}, complete-action-{id}, escalate-action-{id}, cancel-action-{id}, done-action-{id}, escalate-task-modal-overlay. Login requires keyboard.press('Enter') to submit.

feature_coverage.task_completion_api: PASS - PATCH /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/actions/{action_id} with status='completed' sets completed_by and completed_at
feature_coverage.completion_activity_log: PASS - action_completed event appears in timeline.action_events
feature_coverage.completed_section_ui: PASS - Tasks appear in 'Completed & Resolved' section with strikethrough text, status badge, and 'Coach Williams · Mar 12' format
feature_coverage.task_escalation_api: PASS - POST /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/actions/{action_id}/escalate creates director_action, sets task status='escalated'
feature_coverage.escalation_activity_log: PASS - action_escalated event logged with reason in description
feature_coverage.escalate_modal_ui: PASS - EscalateTaskModal opens with reason textarea, displays task name, Escalate/Cancel buttons work
feature_coverage.task_cancellation_api: PASS - PATCH with status='cancelled' sets cancelled_by and cancelled_at
feature_coverage.add_task_modal: PASS - AddActionModal opens with title, assignee dropdown, due date, notes fields, Create Action button
feature_coverage.frontend_sections: PASS - Next Actions shows active task count (12→11 after complete), Completed & Resolved shows done count (10) with status badges (COMPLETED/CANCELLED/ESCALATED)
